rulings.Rulings: GRANT IF MOVANT PROVIDES TIMELY SIGNED PROOF OF SERVICE. OTHERWISE, OFF CALENDAR.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED. DEFENDANT TO BRING COPY OF MOTION TO DELIVER TO CLERK AT 9:30AM. (PB)

USA TRIATHLON: GRANT DEFENDANT USA TRIATHLON REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. SUSTAIN USA TRIATHLON DEMURRER TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE CLAIM WITH REQUIRED SPECIFICITY. OVERRULE USA TRIATHLON DEMURRER AS TO ALL OTHER CLAIMS. CITY CYCLE: OVERRULE CITY CYCLE DEMURRER TO 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES CLAIM FOR FAILURE TO WARN. SUSTAIN CITY CYCLE DEMURRER TO 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF ORAL CONTRACT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE DAMAGES. SUSTAIN CITY CYCLE DEMURRER TO 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT SPOLIATION HERE. BELL SPORTS: SUSTAIN BELL SPORTS DEMURRER TO 18TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE WITH REQUIRED SPECIFICITY. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: NIITSUMA VS ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY, SETTLED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: KISIEL VS MILL VALLEY INSURANCE SERVICES
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Not Of Mot And Mot Of Pltffs For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint; Mp&As

rulings.Case Title: VINE VS BEAR VALLEY SKI COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Not Of Mot And Mot For Order Transferring Action Based Upon Convenience Of Witness And To Promote The Interest Of Justice
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE DENIED UNTIMELY. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: VINE VS BEAR VALLEY SKI COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. RELEASE AMBIGUOUS RE SNOW BOARDING ALSO RELEASE ONLY APPLICABLE DURING SEASON. PRIMARY ASSUMPTION OF RISK NOT APPLICABLE SEE BRANCO VS. KEARNEY 37 CAL.APP.4TH 184. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER JUMP LATENT DEFECT OR OBVIOUS DANGER. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER WORKER'S COMPENSATION APPLICABLE BECAUSE ACCIDENT OCCURRED AT POST SEASON PARTY. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE APPLICABILITY OF LABOR CODE 3352(F). (PB)

DENY THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DEFAMATION. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO 1ST, 2ND, 3RD, 4TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. (JH)

DEMURRER AS TO FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PROPERTY NOT OWNED BY PLAINTIFF BUT RATHER SFO AIRPORT COMMISSION ACCORDINGLY NO DUTY OWED TO PLAINTIFF RE MAINTENANCE OF PROPERTY. (AD(EX)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX LELIEVRE et al VS. SCOTT HUNTER et al
rulings.Rulings: DENY FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. COURT WILL ENTERTAIN MOTION TO MODIFY PURSUANT TO CCP 533. (PB)
